codeReview.summary: The feature cleanly moves proforma-only concerns into `SalesProformaBoundaryService`, persists explicit payment mode on sales orders, keeps create/update flows commercial-only, and uses shortage-driven factory requirements instead of stock reservation. The reviewed diff and the recorded feature verification cover dealer provisioning continuity, credit posture enforcement, explicit payment modes, no stock/accounting side effects on proforma creation, and shortage-to-production behavior without showing a regression in the touched O2C truth boundary.

summary: Pass. Proformas stay commercial-only before dispatch, payment mode is explicit, and shortages now create refreshable production requirements instead of silently reserving stock.
